action.description:
Introduced by Senators Drake, L. Johnson, Roys, Carpenter, Wall, Dassler-Alfheim, Larson, Ratcliff, Hesselbein, Spreitzer and Wirch; 
cosponsored by Representatives Haywood, Taylor, Moore Omokunde, Stubbs, Madison, Rivera-Wagner, Goodwin, Miresse, Sinicki, Udell, Stroud, Doyle, Kirsch, Prado, Fitzgerald, Roe, Snodgrass, Joers, Neubauer, Subeck, Ortiz-Velez, DeSmidt, Johnson, Palmeri and Clancy
